points: Owned backend development for two production products end to end — API design, database schema, business logic, and AWS deployment.

72 Dragons Art Website — Built an e-commerce platform where artists showcase and sell their artwork. Developed Core PHP (OOP) REST APIs for artwork listings, artist profiles, uploads, orders and validation utilities, integrated with a React frontend.

Sprint Management Tool — Built an internal Node.js + Express + React tool to assign and track employee tasks, sprints and project progress, with automated email notifications for assignments, status changes and deadlines.
Deployed and maintained both applications on AWS EC2, with Amazon S3 for artwork and media storage.
Ran structured QA and regression testing across web and mobile views, logging and tracking defects through to closure with the product team.
Find Blood Donor Near Me — Developed a MERN web application that helps patients and hospitals locate registered blood donors near their location.
Implemented donor registration, blood-group and proximity based donor search, and REST APIs using Node.js, Express and MongoDB.
Built the React frontend and deployed the application on AWS EC2 with S3 for image storage.
